idea-plugin.name: Breeze Dev Helper
idea-plugin.description:
Breeze Dev Helper is a developer productivity plugin with two independent feature sets: bidirectional navigation between source code and specification documents, and an MCP server that lets AI assistants control IntelliJ's debugger directly.

🤖 AI Debug Control (MCP Server)

Starts a local HTTP server (default port 19876) that exposes IntelliJ's debugger via the Model Context Protocol. An AI assistant (e.g. Claude) can set breakpoints, inspect variables, evaluate expressions, and step through code — without you touching the IDE manually.

Exposed MCP tools include:

  • create_remote_debug_config – create a Remote JVM Debug run configuration; automatically establishes an SSH tunnel through the jumper host
  • launch_debug / stop_debug – connect and disconnect the debugger
  • add_breakpoint / remove_breakpoint / list_breakpoints – manage breakpoints
  • get_debug_status – returns RUNNING or PAUSED at file:line
  • read_variables / get_stack_frames – inspect the current suspended frame
  • evaluate_expressions – batch-evaluate Java expressions
  • step_over / step_into / step_out / resume_debug – execution control
  • setup – one-stop initialization: auto-detects idea CLI and jumper SSH settings

Configure the MCP endpoint in your AI client: http://localhost:19876/mcp

📄 Jump to Document (Code Comment → Markdown)

Write @spec <path>.md in a Java, Kotlin, or Scala comment, then press Ctrl/Cmd+B or Ctrl/Cmd+Click on the path to jump directly to the corresponding Markdown document.

🔗 Jump to Code (Markdown → Source Code)

Place a spec-jump:// link in your Markdown file, then press Ctrl/Cmd+B, Ctrl/Cmd+Click, or click the link in the preview panel to navigate to the specified location in Java/Kotlin/Scala source code.

Supported link formats:

  • spec-jump://com.example.MyClass – jump to class
  • spec-jump://com.example.MyClass#myMethod – jump to method or field
  • spec-jump://com.example.MyClass:42 – jump to line number
  • spec-jump://com.example.MyClass#myMethod:42 – method + line offset

⚙️ Settings

All options are under Settings → Tools → Breeze Dev Helper:

  • MCP Server – enable/disable, listening port
  • Jumper SSH Tunnel – MIS ID, jumper host, proxy script path, SSH key paths
  • Comment Keyword – default @spec
  • Link Protocol Prefix – default spec-jump://
